name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.7.10 Terms gate and tasklist polish
label: Terms gate and tasklist polish
release_notes: Fixes the duplicate terms acceptance checkbox caused by Streamlit tab rendering and replaces the visible table-style PDF tasklist with a cleaner Pathmark card layout.
notes: Made post-login Terms & Privacy checkbox keys unique across Planning, Finance, and Nutrition so Streamlit tabs cannot collide.
Kept the one-time terms acceptance model from v0.7.9.
Reworked the printable tasklist PDF so it no longer presents as a visible grid table.
Project steps/focus blocks and supporting time blocks now print as clean cards, with support blocks indented below their parent context.
Preserved the previous wizard clarification that Projects/Routines are containers and activities are what become Calendar/Tasks items.
